ValidationRule.description: Direct Phone number format shall always start by "+" and contain a country code
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Bypass_Apex__c = false, NOT (ISBLANK(MobilePhone )), NOT( REGEX( MobilePhone , "^\\+([0-9 ]+)$" ) && LEN( SUBSTITUTE(MobilePhone , " ", "") ) < 26 && LEN( SUBSTITUTE(MobilePhone , " ", "") ) > 6 ), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a direct phone number starting with "+" and a country code (Example : +33 142 86 XX XX)
